metadata.title: In the Open
tracklist: 01 Asuna, Tomoyoshi Date, Federico Durand - In the forest on the hill of old castle.
02 Asuna, Tomoyoshi Date, Federico Durand - The pond of the water mirror garden.
03 Asuna, Tomoyoshi Date, Federico Durand - Gates and ramparts.
04 Asuna, Tomoyoshi Date, Federico Durand - Sweeping the leaves like a quiet wave.
05 Asuna, Tomoyoshi Date, Federico Durand - On the shore of the stray pond.
06 Asuna, Tomoyoshi Date, Federico Durand - The noon crescent is waiting for the cherry blossoms to bloom.
07 Asuna, Tomoyoshi Date, Federico Durand - Down through the tunnel to the river.
08 Asuna, Tomoyoshi Date, Federico Durand - Lunch before farewell at the soba house.
